visible_entities.desc: Dense urban cityscape with numerous white and beige high-rise buildings and a prominent tall, modern skyscraper with vertical window patterns on the right side.

atomic_facts.fact: The video displays a static aerial view of a coastal city.
The text overlay reads: 'On August 4, 2020, a massive explosion occurred in the Port of Beirut, decimating the 5,000-year-old city.'
The sky transitions from bright yellow to dark purple.

ocr: On August 4, 2020, a massive explosion occurred in the Port of Beirut, decimating the 5,000-year-old city.
spatial: The cityscape is located on the left side of the frame, while the body of water is on the right side. The sky is above both the city and the water. The text overlay is centered in the middle of the screen, superimposed over the background scenery.

The smartphone screen displays the text 'Learn about the Global Goals' and 'Reduced Inequalities'.
The text 'GENERATION 17' is positioned to the left of the smartphone image.
The Samsung Galaxy and UNDP logos appear side-by-side on a black background.

ocr: Visit the Samsung Global Goals app
Every day, people are taking action to realize the Global Goals. See what's been going on below.
World leaders agreed to 17 goals for a better world by 2030. These goals have the power to change the world and the people on it.
spatial: The 'GENERATION 17' text and call to action are located on the left side of the screen, while the smartphone displaying the app interface is on the right. In the subsequent frame, the 'SAMSUNG Galaxy' text is to the left of the UNDP logo, separated by a vertical line.
